google_reviews.text: Started with Clyde Strength as a total beginner who had never touched a barbell. Six months in and I can deadlift my own bodyweight. Patient coaching, never rushed, never judgemental.
Booked postnatal sessions eight weeks after my second was born. They took the rehab work seriously, progressed me slowly, and I am stronger now than I was pre-pregnancy.
Trained for my first 10k with their run prep plan. Hit my goal time with room to spare and my knees survived the whole programme. Worth the investment.
The small-group format is brilliant. Cheaper than 1-to-1 but still proper coaching and attention. I have been going twice a week for nearly a year.
Nutrition and habit coaching alongside the sessions made the real difference. Sustainable changes, no extreme diets, steady progress every single month.
